definitions.zh: 故障与诊断是以诊断信号为关键概念的本体边界；诊断信号、症状、故障事件、故障模式、严重度与受影响对象。 其成员归属遵循：当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Failures and diagnostics is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion Diagnostic Signal; Diagnostic signals, symptoms, failure events, failure modes, severity, and affected objects. Membership follows: Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.
definitions.ja: 障害と診断は診断信号を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。診断信号、症状、障害イベント、障害モード、重大度、影響対象。 所属判定は次に従います：事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 把异常迹象解释为可诊断的故障事件与故障模式，并记录从证据到处置结果的推理链。
purpose.en: Interpret anomalous signals as diagnosable failure events and failure modes, preserving the reasoning chain from evidence to resolution.
purpose.ja: 異常な兆候を診断可能な障害イベントと障害モードとして解釈し、証拠から解決結果までの推論連鎖を記録します。

includes.zh: 诊断信号、症状、故障事件、故障模式、严重度与受影响对象。
includes.en: Diagnostic signals, symptoms, failure events, failure modes, severity, and affected objects.
includes.ja: 診断信号、症状、障害イベント、障害モード、重大度、影響対象。

includes.zh: 诊断假设、根因证据、处置建议、解决记录和未解决状态。
includes.en: Diagnostic hypotheses, root-cause evidence, remediation recommendations, resolution records, and unresolved status.
includes.ja: 診断仮説、根本原因の証拠、対処提案、解決記録、未解決状態。

excludes.zh: 原始 TraceEvent、Span 状态和检查点归追踪与检查点；只有被解释为症状或故障的事实进入这里。
excludes.en: Raw TraceEvent values, span status, and checkpoints belong to tracing and checkpoints; only facts interpreted as symptoms or failures enter here.
excludes.ja: 生の TraceEvent、span 状態、チェックポイントはトレースとチェックポイントに属し、症状または障害として解釈された事実だけを扱います。

excludes.zh: 日志传输、汇聚和导出归日志与遥测，日志消息本身不自动成为故障事件。
excludes.en: Log transport, aggregation, and export belong to logging and telemetry; a log message does not automatically become a failure event.
excludes.ja: ログの転送、集約、出力はログとテレメトリに属し、ログメッセージが自動的に障害イベントになることはありません。

description.zh: 故障与诊断的输入概念族为错误事件、警告事件；责任交接由已接受事实 错误事件 —classified_by→ 失败模式 (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode)；警告事件 —raises→ 警告 (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) 明确给出。 共享关系在本面的职责：在输入面，该事实以 ErrorEvent 端点标明等待诊断分类的观测事件；FailureMode 尚不是另一次输入。在输入面，该事实以 WarningEvent 端点标明触发解释的事件；它与随后形成的 Warning 信息记录保持身份分离。
description.en: The input families for Failures and diagnostics are error event, warning event; the accepted facts error event —classified_by→ failure mode (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode); warning event —raises→ warning (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) make the responsibility handoff explicit. Facet-specific role of shared facts: On the input facet, this fact uses the ErrorEvent endpoint to identify an observed event awaiting diagnostic classification; FailureMode is not treated as a second input. On the input facet, this fact uses the WarningEvent endpoint to identify the event that triggers interpretation while keeping it distinct from the resulting Warning information record.
description.ja: 障害と診断の入力概念族はエラーイベント、警告イベントです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 エラーイベント —classified_by→ 失敗モード (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode)；警告イベント —raises→ 警告 (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) により明示されます。 共有関係のこの面での役割：入力面では、この事実の ErrorEvent 端点が診断分類を待つ観測イベントを示し、FailureMode を別の入力とは扱いません。入力面では、この事実の WarningEvent 端点が解釈を起動するイベントを示し、後に形成される Warning 情報記録とは同一視しません。

description.zh: 故障与诊断的输出概念族为诊断消息、警告；责任交接由已接受事实 错误事件 —emits→ 诊断消息 (ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage)；警告事件 —raises→ 警告 (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) 明确给出。 共享关系在本面的职责：在输出面，同一事实以 Warning 端点标明可被日志、审查或策略消费的诊断信息，而不是再次把 WarningEvent 当作输出。
description.en: The output families for Failures and diagnostics are diagnostic message, warning; the accepted facts error event —emits→ diagnostic message (ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage); warning event —raises→ warning (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) make the responsibility handoff explicit. Facet-specific role of shared facts: On the output facet, the same fact uses the Warning endpoint to identify diagnostic information consumable by logging, review, or policy, rather than treating WarningEvent itself as the output.
description.ja: 障害と診断の出力概念族は診断メッセージ、警告です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 エラーイベント —emits→ 診断メッセージ (ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage)；警告イベント —raises→ 警告 (WarningEvent-raises-Warning) により明示されます。 共有関係のこの面での役割：出力面では、同じ事実の Warning 端点がログ、レビュー、方針で利用できる診断情報を示し、WarningEvent 自体を出力とは扱いません。

description.zh: 故障与诊断的失败概念族为阻断错误、失败模式；责任交接由已接受事实 阻断错误 —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 执行尝试 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)；错误事件 —classified_by→ 失败模式 (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode) 明确给出。 共享关系在本面的职责：在失败面，同一事实以 FailureMode 端点表达对 ErrorEvent 的失败判定；只有分类结果而非事件共现决定失败语义。
description.en: The failure families for Failures and diagnostics are blocking error, failure mode; the accepted facts blocking error —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ run attempt (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt); error event —classified_by→ failure mode (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode) make the responsibility handoff explicit. Facet-specific role of shared facts: On the failure facet, the same fact uses the FailureMode endpoint to express adjudication of the ErrorEvent; the classification, not event co-occurrence, determines failure semantics.
description.ja: 障害と診断の失敗概念族はブロッキングエラー、失敗モードです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 ブロッキングエラー —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 実行試行 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)；エラーイベント —classified_by→ 失敗モード (ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode) により明示されます。 共有関係のこの面での役割：失敗面では、同じ事実の FailureMode 端点が ErrorEvent の失敗判定を表し、イベントの共起ではなく分類結果が失敗意味を決めます。

description.zh: 故障与诊断的恢复概念族为恢复计划；责任交接由已接受事实 可重试错误 —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ 恢复计划 (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan) 明确给出。
description.en: The recovery families for Failures and diagnostics are recovery plan; the accepted facts retryable error —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ recovery plan (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 障害と診断の回復概念族は復旧計画です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 再試行可能エラー —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ 復旧計画 (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan) により明示されます。

decision_note.zh: 故障与诊断与追踪与检查点按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Failures and diagnostics and Tracing and checkpoints are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 障害と診断とトレースとチェックポイントは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 故障与诊断与追踪与检查点按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。

labels.zh: 哪些原始观测被同一次诊断解释为症状，并支持了哪个故障事件？：正例
labels.en: Which raw observations were interpreted as symptoms by one diagnostic act, and which failure event did they support?: positive case
labels.ja: どの生観測が同じ診断行為によって症状と解釈され、どの障害イベントを裏付けましたか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：追踪事件 —trace_event_records_error_event→ 错误事件 (trace_event_records_error_event)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: trace event —trace_event_records_error_event→ error event (trace_event_records_error_event).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：トレースイベント —trace_event_records_error_event→ エラーイベント (trace_event_records_error_event)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Every failure event has at least one cited observation through an explicit diagnostic interpretation; temporal adjacency alone is insufficient.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Every failure event has at least one cited observation through an explicit diagnostic interpretation; temporal adjacency alone is insufficient.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Every failure event has at least one cited observation through an explicit diagnostic interpretation; temporal adjacency alone is insufficient.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langsmith-docs at Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3 (feedback-warning-error.signal-to-failure), owned by feedback-warning-error and compared with runtime-observability. The source does not define Moonweave CQ feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "For one Diagnosis, return cited runtime observations, derived DiagnosticSignal values, and the supported FailureEvent." and expected assertion "Every failure event has at least one cited observation through an explicit diagnostic interpretation; temporal adjacency alone is insufficient." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model

labels.zh: 哪些原始观测被同一次诊断解释为症状，并支持了哪个故障事件？：反例
labels.en: Which raw observations were interpreted as symptoms by one diagnostic act, and which failure event did they support?: counterexample
labels.ja: どの生観測が同じ診断行為によって症状と解釈され、どの障害イベントを裏付けましたか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“哪些原始观测被同一次诊断解释为症状，并支持了哪个故障事件？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Which raw observations were interpreted as symptoms by one diagnostic act, and which failure event did they support?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「どの生観測が同じ診断行為によって症状と解釈され、どの障害イベントを裏付けましたか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

The source does not define Moonweave CQ feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. labels.zh: 一个失败是可重复的 FailureMode，还是某次执行中的 FailureEvent？：正例
labels.en: Is a failure a repeatable FailureMode or a FailureEvent in one execution attempt?: positive case
labels.ja: ある障害は再現可能な FailureMode ですか、それとも一回の実行における FailureEvent ですか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：阻断错误 —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 执行尝试 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: blocking error —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ run attempt (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：ブロッキングエラー —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 実行試行 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：A mode is identified independently of one attempt; an event is tied to exactly one occurrence and may instantiate or evidence a mode.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: A mode is identified independently of one attempt; an event is tied to exactly one occurrence and may instantiate or evidence a mode.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：A mode is identified independently of one attempt; an event is tied to exactly one occurrence and may instantiate or evidence a mode.

why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

The source does not define Moonweave CQ feedback-warning-error-cq-mode-versus-occurrence-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. labels.zh: 某项处置为何可标记为已解决，修复后有哪些复验结果支持它？：正例
labels.en: Why may a remediation be marked resolved, and which post-fix verification results support that status?: positive case
labels.ja: ある対処を解決済みとみなせる理由と、修正後のどの再検証結果がその状態を裏付けますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：可重试错误 —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ 恢复计划 (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: retryable error —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ recovery plan (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：再試行可能エラー —retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan→ 復旧計画 (retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Resolved status requires passing reevaluation evidence for the affected event; a recommendation without verification remains proposed.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Resolved status requires passing reevaluation evidence for the affected event; a recommendation without verification remains proposed.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Resolved status requires passing reevaluation evidence for the affected event; a recommendation without verification remains proposed.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

labels.zh: 某项处置为何可标记为已解决，修复后有哪些复验结果支持它？：反例
labels.en: Why may a remediation be marked resolved, and which post-fix verification results support that status?: counterexample
labels.ja: ある対処を解決済みとみなせる理由と、修正後のどの再検証結果がその状態を裏付けますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“某项处置为何可标记为已解决，修复后有哪些复验结果支持它？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Why may a remediation be marked resolved, and which post-fix verification results support that status?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「ある対処を解決済みとみなせる理由と、修正後のどの再検証結果がその状態を裏付けますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

questions.en: Which raw observations were interpreted as symptoms by one diagnostic act, and which failure event did they support?

competency_questions.query: For one Diagnosis, return cited runtime observations, derived DiagnosticSignal values, and the supported FailureEvent.
competency_questions.expected_assertion: Every failure event has at least one cited observation through an explicit diagnostic interpretation; temporal adjacency alone is insufficient.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查逐项核对 feedback-warning-error 的实际归属规则、主问题和输入/输出/失败/恢复事实：owns_when="Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime."; competency_questions=[feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-mode-versus-occurrence-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-resolution-evidence-v3]; input{families=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent;relations=ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; output{families=DiagnosticMessage|Warning;relations=ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; failure{families=BlockingError|FailureMode;relations=blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt|ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode}; recovery{families=RecoveryPlan;relations=retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan}；领域审查不决定骨架布局。
decision_note.en: Domain review checked feedback-warning-error's actual ownership rule, primary questions, and input/output/failure/recovery facts: owns_when="Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime."; competency_questions=[feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-mode-versus-occurrence-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-resolution-evidence-v3]; input{families=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent;relations=ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; output{families=DiagnosticMessage|Warning;relations=ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; failure{families=BlockingError|FailureMode;relations=blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt|ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode}; recovery{families=RecoveryPlan;relations=retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan}; domain review does not decide backbone layout.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は feedback-warning-error の実際の所有規則、主要質問、入力・出力・失敗・回復事実を項目別に確認しました：owns_when="Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime."; competency_questions=[feedback-warning-error-cq-signal-to-failure-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-mode-versus-occurrence-v3,feedback-warning-error-cq-resolution-evidence-v3]; input{families=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent;relations=ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; output{families=DiagnosticMessage|Warning;relations=ErrorEvent-emits-DiagnosticMessage|WarningEvent-raises-Warning}; failure{families=BlockingError|FailureMode;relations=blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt|ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode}; recovery{families=RecoveryPlan;relations=retryable_error_triggers_recovery_plan}。ドメイン審査はバックボーン配置を決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查逐项核对 feedback-warning-error 的关键概念、相邻边界、交互方向和显式根/骨架数量：key_notion=DiagnosticSignal; overlap_modules=[runtime-observability,runtime-execution-attempts,feedback-review-optimization]; interaction=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent -> DiagnosticMessage|Warning; roots=4; backbone=8；本体审查不决定领域问题归属。
decision_note.en: Ontology review checked feedback-warning-error's actual key notion, overlap peers, interaction direction, and explicit root/backbone counts: key_notion=DiagnosticSignal; overlap_modules=[runtime-observability,runtime-execution-attempts,feedback-review-optimization]; interaction=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent -> DiagnosticMessage|Warning; roots=4; backbone=8; ontology review does not decide domain-question ownership.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は feedback-warning-error の実際の主要概念、重複相手、相互作用方向、明示ルート・バックボーン数を項目別に確認しました：key_notion=DiagnosticSignal; overlap_modules=[runtime-observability,runtime-execution-attempts,feedback-review-optimization]; interaction=ErrorEvent|WarningEvent -> DiagnosticMessage|Warning; roots=4; backbone=8。本体審査はドメイン質問の所有を決定しません。

decision_note.zh: feedback-warning-error 的三语名称按实际值逐项复核：zh="故障与诊断"; en="Failures and diagnostics"; ja="障害と診断"；purpose、边界和 CQ 表达也已复核，语言审查不决定 owner 或 backbone。
decision_note.en: feedback-warning-error's actual trilingual labels were checked exactly: zh="故障与诊断"; en="Failures and diagnostics"; ja="障害と診断"; purpose, boundary, and CQ wording were also reviewed, while language review does not decide owner or backbone.
decision_note.ja: feedback-warning-error の実際の三言語ラベルを値どおりに確認しました：zh="故障与诊断"; en="Failures and diagnostics"; ja="障害と診断"。purpose、境界、CQ 表現も審査し、言語審査は owner や backbone を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 故障与诊断在 v3 中完成命名、owner、交互合同、CQ 与任意深度骨架复审。
change_note.en: Failures and diagnostics completed its v3 naming, ownership, interaction-contract, CQ, and arbitrary-depth-backbone review.
change_note.ja: 障害と診断は v3 で名称、所有権、相互作用契約、CQ、任意深度バックボーンの再審査を完了しました。

owns_when.zh: 当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.
owns_when.ja: 事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 运行追踪、评审或优化需要说明某个事件为何被视为故障及如何解决时，引用这里的诊断实体。
references_when.en: Runtime tracing, review, or optimization references these diagnostic entities when explaining why an event is a failure and how it was resolved.
references_when.ja: 実行トレース、レビュー、最適化がイベントを障害と判断した理由や解決方法を示すとき、ここで定義した診断実体を参照します。

rationale.zh: 追踪与检查点拥有原始发生记录；故障与诊断拥有对这些记录的症状判读、故障归类与处置结论。 本条仅记录 ErrorEvent；其 canonical owner 是故障与诊断（feedback-warning-error），因此 feedback-warning-error 在此拥有这些概念。
rationale.en: Tracing and checkpoints own raw occurrence records; failures and diagnostics own symptom interpretation, failure classification, and resolution conclusions about them. This record is limited to ErrorEvent; their canonical owner is Failures and diagnostics (feedback-warning-error), so feedback-warning-error owns these concepts here.
rationale.ja: トレースとチェックポイントは生の発生記録を所有し、障害と診断はその症状解釈、障害分類、解決結論を所有します。 この記録は ErrorEvent だけを対象とし、canonical owner は障害と診断（feedback-warning-error）です。したがって feedback-warning-error はここでこれらを所有します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langsmith-docs at Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used to compare feedback-warning-error with runtime-observability, including ErrorEvent. The source does not define Moonweave Modules feedback-warning-error or runtime-observability, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under feedback-warning-error's owns_when "Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If the record remains complete after removing diagnostic hypotheses and failure mechanism, it is runtime observation; if identity depends on a diagnostic conclusion or repeatable mechanism, it belongs to failures and diagnostics."; result=owns and owner=feedback-warning-error are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model

semantic_area.en: Runtime error observations versus diagnosed failures
semantic_area.ja: 実行エラー観測と診断済み障害

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都可能带错误码和时间，但观测回答发生了什么，诊断回答为何构成故障及其机制。 本条仅记录 ErrorEvent、ErrorStream；其 canonical owner 是故障与诊断（feedback-warning-error），因此 feedback-warning-error 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both may carry an error code and time, but an observation says what occurred while a diagnosis says why it constitutes a failure and by what mechanism. This record is limited to ErrorEvent, ErrorStream; their canonical owner is Failures and diagnostics (feedback-warning-error), so feedback-warning-error owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: どちらもエラーコードと時刻を持ち得ますが、観測は何が起きたか、診断はなぜ障害でどの機構によるかを答えます。 この記録は ErrorEvent、ErrorStream だけを対象とし、canonical owner は障害と診断（feedback-warning-error）です。したがって feedback-warning-error はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 若去掉诊断假设和故障机制后记录仍完整，则归运行观测；若身份依赖诊断结论或可重复机制，则归故障与诊断。
disambiguation_test.en: If the record remains complete after removing diagnostic hypotheses and failure mechanism, it is runtime observation; if identity depends on a diagnostic conclusion or repeatable mechanism, it belongs to failures and diagnostics.
disambiguation_test.ja: 診断仮説と障害機構を除いても記録が完全なら実行観測、同一性が診断結論または再現機構に依存すれば障害と診断に属します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langsmith-docs at Documentation page > LangSmith docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used to compare feedback-warning-error with runtime-observability, including ErrorEvent, ErrorStream. The source does not define Moonweave Modules feedback-warning-error or runtime-observability, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under feedback-warning-error's owns_when "Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If the record remains complete after removing diagnostic hypotheses and failure mechanism, it is runtime observation; if identity depends on a diagnostic conclusion or repeatable mechanism, it belongs to failures and diagnostics."; result=distinct and owner=feedback-warning-error are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

semantic_area.zh: 失败解释与失败执行发生
semantic_area.en: Failure interpretation versus failed execution occurrence
semantic_area.ja: 失敗解釈と失敗 execution occurrence

overlap_reason.zh: 一次失败 outcome 是运行事实，FailureMode 则可跨多次尝试复现；诊断活动把观测证据解释为二者间的支持关系。 本条仅记录 BlockingError、FailureEvent；其 canonical owner 是故障与诊断（feedback-warning-error），因此 feedback-warning-error 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: A failed outcome is a runtime fact, whereas a FailureMode can recur across attempts; diagnosis interprets observations as evidence linking them. This record is limited to BlockingError, FailureEvent; their canonical owner is Failures and diagnostics (feedback-warning-error), so feedback-warning-error owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: failed outcome は実行事実、FailureMode は複数 attempt で再現でき、diagnosis が observation を両者の支持証拠として解釈します。 この記録は BlockingError、FailureEvent だけを対象とし、canonical owner は障害と診断（feedback-warning-error）です。したがって feedback-warning-error はここでこれらを所有します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 仅由 attempt id 和终止状态识别的对象归执行尝试；需要症状、假设或根因证据才能识别的对象归失败与诊断。
disambiguation_test.en: An object identifiable only by attempt ID and terminal state belongs to execution attempts; one requiring symptom, hypothesis, or root-cause evidence belongs to failures and diagnostics.
disambiguation_test.ja: attempt id と終端状態だけで識別できれば execution attempt、symptom・hypothesis・root-cause evidence が必要なら failure/diagnostic に属します。

overlap_reason.zh: 诊断可以提出 remediation，但只有评审流程分配责任、接受或拒绝 Finding 并依据复评关闭它。 本条仅记录 RecoveryAction、ReviewFinding；其 canonical owner 是审查与纠正（feedback-review-optimization），因此 feedback-warning-error 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Diagnosis can propose remediation, but only the review process assigns responsibility, accepts or rejects a Finding, and closes it using reevaluation. This record is limited to RecoveryAction, ReviewFinding; their canonical owner is Review and correction (feedback-review-optimization), so feedback-warning-error references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: diagnosis は remediation を提案できますが、responsibility 割当、Finding の accept/reject、reevaluation による closure は review process が行います。 この記録は RecoveryAction、ReviewFinding だけを対象とし、canonical owner はレビューと修正（feedback-review-optimization）です。したがって feedback-warning-error はここでこれらを参照します。

disambiguation_test.zh: 回答“发生了什么、可能为何发生”的对象归失败与诊断；回答“谁应修正、是否已验证关闭”的对象归评审与修正。
disambiguation_test.en: Objects answering what happened and why it may have happened belong to failures and diagnostics; objects answering who must correct it and whether closure was verified belong to review and correction.
disambiguation_test.ja: 「何が起き、なぜか」を答えるものは failure/diagnostic、「誰が修正し closure が検証済みか」を答えるものは review/correction に属します。

decision_note.ja: 「何が起き、なぜか」を答えるものは failure/diagnostic、「誰が修正し closure が検証済みか」を答えるものは review/correction に属します。

decision_note.zh: 回答“发生了什么、可能为何发生”的对象归失败与诊断；回答“谁应修正、是否已验证关闭”的对象归评审与修正。
decision_note.en: Objects answering what happened and why it may have happened belong to failures and diagnostics; objects answering who must correct it and whether closure was verified belong to review and correction.
decision_note.ja: 「何が起き、なぜか」を答えるものは failure/diagnostic、「誰が修正し closure が検証済みか」を答えるものは review/correction に属します。

short_definitions.zh: 阻断错误是以如下事实为区分特征的失败模式：它记录会影响运行决策的阻断性失败、风险、不确定性、置信度下降或诊断证据。
short_definitions.en: Blocking error is a failure mode; its differentiating condition is that it is a failure condition that blocks or terminates a run attempt, tool invocation, policy-gated operation, or protocol exchange until recovery, escalation, rollback, or operator intervention occurs.
short_definitions.ja: ブロッキングエラーは失敗モードの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行判断に影響する阻止的失敗、リスク、不確実性、信頼度低下、診断証拠を記録します。

definitions.zh: 阻断错误是以如下事实为区分特征的失败模式：它记录会影响运行决策的阻断性失败、风险、不确定性、置信度下降或诊断证据。
definitions.en: Blocking error is a failure mode; its differentiating condition is that it is a failure condition that blocks or terminates a run attempt, tool invocation, policy-gated operation, or protocol exchange until recovery, escalation, rollback, or operator intervention occurs.
definitions.ja: ブロッキングエラーは失敗モードの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行判断に影響する阻止的失敗、リスク、不確実性、信頼度低下、診断証拠を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 阻断错误为canonical 事实 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt（BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt）提供明确端点并保持与 RetryableError 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: blocking error provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt (BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt) while preserving its reviewed boundary from RetryableError.
why_needed.ja: ブロッキングエラーはcanonical 事実 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt（BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt）の明確な端点を提供し、RetryableError との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的阻断错误：阻断错误是以如下事实为区分特征的失败模式：它记录会影响运行决策的阻断性失败、风险、不确定性、置信度下降或诊断证据。；该种差可由关系 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes blocking error records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Blocking error is a failure mode; its differentiating condition is that it is a failure condition that blocks or terminates a run attempt, tool invocation, policy-gated operation, or protocol exchange until recovery, escalation, rollback, or operator intervention occurs. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすブロッキングエラーを含みます：ブロッキングエラーは失敗モードの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行判断に影響する阻止的失敗、リスク、不確実性、信頼度低下、診断証拠を記録します。 種差は関係 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 可重试错误虽与本概念同属 FailureMode，但其定义为“可重试错误是一种失败模式；其区分条件是：它标识在有界策略下可以重试的错误，因为失败是临时的、可恢复的或由外部原因造成。”，不得替代阻断错误。
excludes.en: RetryableError shares parent FailureMode, but its reviewed definition is “As a failure mode, Retryable error is distinguished by the fact that it identifies an error that may be retried under bounded policy because the failure is transient, recoverable, or externally caused.”; it must not be substituted for BlockingError.
excludes.ja: RetryableError は同じ上位 FailureMode を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「失敗モードに属する再試行可能エラーは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗が一時的、復旧可能、または外部要因によるため、境界付きポリシー下で再試行できるエラーを示します。」であり、BlockingError の代用にはできません。

labels.ja: ブロッキングエラーの正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将阻断错误（BlockingError）记录为 BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt 的源端点。其已审查定义是“阻断错误是以如下事实为区分特征的失败模式：它记录会影响运行决策的阻断性失败、风险、不确定性、置信度下降或诊断证据”。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records blocking error (BlockingError) as the source of BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt. Its reviewed definition is “Blocking error is a failure mode; its differentiating condition is that it is a failure condition that blocks or terminates a run attempt, tool invocation, policy-gated operation, or protocol exchange until recovery, escalation, rollback, or operator intervention occurs”.
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムはブロッキングエラー（BlockingError）を BlockingError blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt RunAttempt の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「ブロッキングエラーは失敗モードの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行判断に影響する阻止的失敗、リスク、不確実性、信頼度低下、診断証拠を記録します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 BlockingError 以及方向保持不变的事实 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt。
expected_result.en: The run can query BlockingError together with direction-preserving fact blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt.
expected_result.ja: この実行では BlockingError と方向を保持した事実 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.ja: ブロッキングエラーの境界例

descriptions.zh: RetryableError 用作BlockingError的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 RetryableError 的已审查定义是“可重试错误是一种失败模式；其区分条件是：它标识在有界策略下可以重试的错误，因为失败是临时的、可恢复的或由外部原因造成。”。不能因 shared parent FailureMode 而把它归入BlockingError。
descriptions.en: RetryableError is the boundary contrast for BlockingError. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but RetryableError's reviewed definition is “As a failure mode, Retryable error is distinguished by the fact that it identifies an error that may be retried under bounded policy because the failure is transient, recoverable, or externally caused.”. shared parent FailureMode does not make it a BlockingError.
descriptions.ja: RetryableError は BlockingError の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、RetryableError の審査済み定義は「失敗モードに属する再試行可能エラーは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗が一時的、復旧可能、または外部要因によるため、境界付きポリシー下で再試行できるエラーを示します。」です。shared parent FailureMode だけで BlockingError にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: RetryableError 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 BlockingError。
expected_result.en: RetryableError retains its own type; validation must not promote it to BlockingError from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: RetryableError は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで BlockingError へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 BlockingError（阻断错误）由 feedback-warning-error 拥有，用于“当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms BlockingError (blocking error) is owned by feedback-warning-error for the use case “Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は BlockingError（ブロッキングエラー）を feedback-warning-error が「事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 BlockingError 的 semantic kind 为 state，主父或骨架为 BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode，并满足“semantic kind=state；backbone=BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms BlockingError has semantic kind state, primary parent or backbone BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode, and invariants “semantic kind=state; backbone=BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は BlockingError の semantic kind が state、主親または骨格が BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode であり、「semantic kind=state、backbone=BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: BlockingError 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for BlockingError were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: BlockingError の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 阻断错误已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: blocking error was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: ブロッキングエラーは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 FailureMode：BlockingError（semantic kind=state，骨架 BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode）；RetryableError（semantic kind=state，骨架 RetryableError-is_a-FailureMode）。双端条件：BlockingError 条件：“阻断错误是以如下事实为区分特征的失败模式：它记录会影响运行决策的阻断性失败、风险、不确定性、置信度下降或诊断证据”；RetryableError 条件：“可重试错误是一种失败模式；其区分条件是：它标识在有界策略下可以重试的错误，因为失败是临时的、可恢复的或由外部原因造成”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent FailureMode: BlockingError (semantic kind=state, backbone BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode); RetryableError (semantic kind=state, backbone RetryableError-is_a-FailureMode). Endpoint conditions: BlockingError condition: “Blocking error is a failure mode; its differentiating condition is that it is a failure condition that blocks or terminates a run attempt, tool invocation, policy-gated operation, or protocol exchange until recovery, escalation, rollback, or operator intervention occurs”; RetryableError condition: “As a failure mode, Retryable error is distinguished by the fact that it identifies an error that may be retried under bounded policy because the failure is transient, recoverable, or externally caused”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 FailureMode：BlockingError（semantic kind=state、バックボーン BlockingError-is_a-FailureMode）；RetryableError（semantic kind=state、バックボーン RetryableError-is_a-FailureMode）。両端条件：BlockingError の条件：「ブロッキングエラーは失敗モードの一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行判断に影響する阻止的失敗、リスク、不確実性、信頼度低下、診断証拠を記録します」；RetryableError の条件：「失敗モードに属する再試行可能エラーは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗が一時的、復旧可能、または外部要因によるため、境界付きポリシー下で再試行できるエラーを示します」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

short_definitions.zh: 置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据。
short_definitions.en: As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision.
short_definitions.ja: 診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です。

definitions.zh: 置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据。
definitions.en: As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision.
definitions.ja: 診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です。

why_needed.zh: 置信信号为canonical 事实 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding（ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding）提供明确端点并保持与 DiagnosticMessage 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: confidence signal provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding (ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DiagnosticMessage.
why_needed.ja: 信頼度信号はcanonical 事実 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding（ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding）の明確な端点を提供し、DiagnosticMessage との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的置信信号：置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据。；该种差可由关系 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes confidence signal records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす信頼度信号を含みます：診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です。 種差は関係 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 诊断消息虽与本概念同属 DiagnosticSignal，但其定义为“诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示。”，不得替代置信信号。
excludes.en: DiagnosticMessage shares parent DiagnosticSignal, but its reviewed definition is “Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings.”; it must not be substituted for ConfidenceSignal.
excludes.ja: DiagnosticMessage は同じ上位 DiagnosticSignal を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです。」であり、ConfidenceSignal の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将置信信号（ConfidenceSignal）记录为 ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding 的源端点。其已审查定义是“置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据”。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records confidence signal (ConfidenceSignal) as the source of ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding. Its reviewed definition is “As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision”.
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムは信頼度信号（ConfidenceSignal）を ConfidenceSignal confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding ReviewFinding の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 ConfidenceSignal 以及方向保持不变的事实 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding。
expected_result.en: The run can query ConfidenceSignal together with direction-preserving fact confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding.
expected_result.ja: この実行では ConfidenceSignal と方向を保持した事実 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: DiagnosticMessage 用作ConfidenceSignal的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DiagnosticMessage 的已审查定义是“诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示。”。不能因 shared parent DiagnosticSignal 而把它归入ConfidenceSignal。
descriptions.en: DiagnosticMessage is the boundary contrast for ConfidenceSignal. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DiagnosticMessage's reviewed definition is “Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings.”. shared parent DiagnosticSignal does not make it a ConfidenceSignal.
descriptions.ja: DiagnosticMessage は ConfidenceSignal の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DiagnosticMessage の審査済み定義は「診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです。」です。shared parent DiagnosticSignal だけで ConfidenceSignal にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DiagnosticMessage 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 ConfidenceSignal。
expected_result.en: DiagnosticMessage retains its own type; validation must not promote it to ConfidenceSignal from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DiagnosticMessage は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで ConfidenceSignal へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、confidence_signal_qualifies_review_finding の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ConfidenceSignal（置信信号）由 feedback-warning-error 拥有，用于“当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ConfidenceSignal (confidence signal) is owned by feedback-warning-error for the use case “Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ConfidenceSignal（信頼度信号）を feedback-warning-error が「事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ConfidenceSignal 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms ConfidenceSignal has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は ConfidenceSignal の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ConfidenceSignal 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ConfidenceSignal were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ConfidenceSignal の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 置信信号已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: confidence signal was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 信頼度信号は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 共享父节点对照：父节点 DiagnosticSignal：ConfidenceSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）；DiagnosticMessage（semantic kind=information，骨架 DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）。双端条件：ConfidenceSignal 条件：“置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据”；DiagnosticMessage 条件：“诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示”。逐端验证；父节点不证明任一身份。
differentia.en: Shared-parent contrast: parent DiagnosticSignal: ConfidenceSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal); DiagnosticMessage (semantic kind=information, backbone DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal). Endpoint conditions: ConfidenceSignal condition: “As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision”; DiagnosticMessage condition: “Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings”. Verify each endpoint; the parent proves neither identity.
differentia.ja: 共有親対照：親 DiagnosticSignal：ConfidenceSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）；DiagnosticMessage（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）。両端条件：ConfidenceSignal の条件：「診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です」；DiagnosticMessage の条件：「診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです」。各端を検証し、親だけでは同一性を証明しません。

short_definitions.zh: 诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示。
short_definitions.en: Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings.
short_definitions.ja: 診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです。

definitions.zh: 诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示。
definitions.en: Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings.
definitions.ja: 診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです。

why_needed.zh: 诊断消息为canonical 事实 diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record（DiagnosticMessage diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record LogRecord）提供明确端点并保持与 ConfidenceSignal 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: diagnostic message provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record (DiagnosticMessage diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record LogRecord) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ConfidenceSignal.
why_needed.ja: 診断メッセージはcanonical 事実 diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record（DiagnosticMessage diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record LogRecord）の明確な端点を提供し、ConfidenceSignal との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的诊断消息：诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示。；该种差可由关系 diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes diagnostic message records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす診断メッセージを含みます：診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです。 種差は関係 diagnostic_message_derived_from_log_record の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 置信信号虽与本概念同属 DiagnosticSignal，但其定义为“置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据。”，不得替代诊断消息。
excludes.en: ConfidenceSignal shares parent DiagnosticSignal, but its reviewed definition is “As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision.”; it must not be substituted for DiagnosticMessage.
excludes.ja: ConfidenceSignal は同じ上位 DiagnosticSignal を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です。」であり、DiagnosticMessage の代用にはできません。

The owner feedback-warning-error, semantic kind information, and backbone placement DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 DiagnosticMessage（诊断消息）由 feedback-warning-error 拥有，用于“当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms DiagnosticMessage (diagnostic message) is owned by feedback-warning-error for the use case “Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は DiagnosticMessage（診断メッセージ）を feedback-warning-error が「事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 DiagnosticMessage 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms DiagnosticMessage has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は DiagnosticMessage の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: DiagnosticMessage 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for DiagnosticMessage were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: DiagnosticMessage の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 诊断消息已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: diagnostic message was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 診断メッセージは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 已审查兄弟区分：父节点 DiagnosticSignal：DiagnosticMessage（semantic kind=information，骨架 DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）；RiskSignal（semantic kind=information，骨架 RiskSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）。双端条件：DiagnosticMessage 条件：“诊断消息属于诊断信号，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是从日志、轨迹事件、验证失败、警告或审查发现派生的诊断输出、调试消息、解释或修复提示”；RiskSignal 条件：“风险信号是以如下事实为区分特征的诊断信号：它是安全桥接信号，记录动作、输出、工具结果、边界跨越、指令或记忆项可能涉及策略敏感、不安全或信任边界相关的证据”。任一条件成立不推出另一端。
differentia.en: Reviewed sibling distinction: parent DiagnosticSignal: DiagnosticMessage (semantic kind=information, backbone DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal); RiskSignal (semantic kind=information, backbone RiskSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal). Endpoint conditions: DiagnosticMessage condition: “Diagnostic message is a Diagnostic Signal whose defining condition is that it is a diagnostic output, debug message, explanation, or remediation hint derived from logs, trace events, validation failures, warnings, or review findings”; RiskSignal condition: “Risk signal is a Diagnostic Signal; its differentiating condition is that it is a safety bridge signal recording evidence that an action, output, tool result, boundary crossing, instruction, or memory item may be policy-sensitive, unsafe, or trust-boundary relevant”. Either condition leaves the other unproven.
differentia.ja: 審査済み兄弟区別：親 DiagnosticSignal：DiagnosticMessage（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DiagnosticMessage-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）；RiskSignal（semantic kind=information、バックボーン RiskSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal）。両端条件：DiagnosticMessage の条件：「診断メッセージは診断信号のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、ログ、トレースイベント、検証失敗、警告、レビュー所見から導かれる診断出力、デバッグメッセージ、説明、修復ヒントです」；RiskSignal の条件：「リスク信号は診断信号の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは安全への橋渡し信号であり、アクション、出力、ツール結果、境界越え、指示、記憶項目がポリシー上重要、安全でない、または信頼境界に関係する可能性の証拠を記録します」。一方の成立は他方を証明しません。

short_definitions.zh: 诊断信号是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DiagnosticSignal 是附着于运行、尝试、结果或评审的信息记录，用于表达警告、风险、置信和诊断；它可以由事件产生，但不等同于事件发生。
short_definitions.en: Diagnostic Signal is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information attached to a run, attempt, result, or review to express warning, risk, confidence, or diagnosis; an event may emit it, but it is not the occurrence itself.
short_definitions.ja: 診断信号は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DiagnosticSignal は実行・試行・結果・レビューに付着し警告・リスク・信頼度・診断を表す情報で、事象から発行され得るが発生自体ではない。

definitions.zh: 诊断信号是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DiagnosticSignal 是附着于运行、尝试、结果或评审的信息记录，用于表达警告、风险、置信和诊断；它可以由事件产生，但不等同于事件发生。
definitions.en: Diagnostic Signal is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information attached to a run, attempt, result, or review to express warning, risk, confidence, or diagnosis; an event may emit it, but it is not the occurrence itself.
definitions.ja: 診断信号は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DiagnosticSignal は実行・試行・結果・レビューに付着し警告・リスク・信頼度・診断を表す情報で、事象から発行され得るが発生自体ではない。

why_needed.zh: 诊断信号为canonical 事实 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal（ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal）提供明确端点并保持与 ConfidenceSignal 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Diagnostic Signal provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal (ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ConfidenceSignal.
why_needed.ja: 診断信号はcanonical 事実 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal（ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal）の明確な端点を提供し、ConfidenceSignal との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的诊断信号：诊断信号是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DiagnosticSignal 是附着于运行、尝试、结果或评审的信息记录，用于表达警告、风险、置信和诊断；它可以由事件产生，但不等同于事件发生。；该种差可由关系 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Diagnostic Signal records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Diagnostic Signal is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information attached to a run, attempt, result, or review to express warning, risk, confidence, or diagnosis; an event may emit it, but it is not the occurrence itself. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす診断信号を含みます：診断信号は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DiagnosticSignal は実行・試行・結果・レビューに付着し警告・リスク・信頼度・診断を表す情報で、事象から発行され得るが発生自体ではない。 種差は関係 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 置信信号只是关系 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal 的另一端；相关联不表示它是诊断信号。
excludes.en: ConfidenceSignal is only the other endpoint of ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal; relatedness does not make it a DiagnosticSignal.
excludes.ja: ConfidenceSignal は ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで DiagnosticSignal にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将诊断信号（DiagnosticSignal）记录为 ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“诊断信号是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：DiagnosticSignal 是附着于运行、尝试、结果或评审的信息记录，用于表达警告、风险、置信和诊断；它可以由事件产生，但不等同于事件发生”。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records Diagnostic Signal (DiagnosticSignal) as the target of ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal. Its reviewed definition is “Diagnostic Signal is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is information attached to a run, attempt, result, or review to express warning, risk, confidence, or diagnosis; an event may emit it, but it is not the occurrence itself”.
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムは診断信号（DiagnosticSignal）を ConfidenceSignal is_a DiagnosticSignal の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「診断信号は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：DiagnosticSignal は実行・試行・結果・レビューに付着し警告・リスク・信頼度・診断を表す情報で、事象から発行され得るが発生自体ではない」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 DiagnosticSignal 以及方向保持不变的事实 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal。
expected_result.en: The run can query DiagnosticSignal together with direction-preserving fact ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal.
expected_result.ja: この実行では DiagnosticSignal と方向を保持した事実 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: ConfidenceSignal 用作DiagnosticSignal的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ConfidenceSignal 的已审查定义是“置信信号是一种诊断信号；其区分条件是：它是附着在观察、审查发现、指标、检索结果、答案、路由选择或策略相关决策上的置信度或不确定性证据。”。不能因 relation ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal 而把它归入DiagnosticSignal。
descriptions.en: ConfidenceSignal is the boundary contrast for DiagnosticSignal. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ConfidenceSignal's reviewed definition is “As a Diagnostic Signal, Confidence signal is distinguished by the fact that it is a confidence or uncertainty evidence attached to an observation, review finding, metric, retrieval result, answer, route choice, or policy-relevant decision.”. relation ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal does not make it a DiagnosticSignal.
descriptions.ja: ConfidenceSignal は DiagnosticSignal の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ConfidenceSignal の審査済み定義は「診断信号に属する信頼度信号は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、観測、レビュー所見、指標、検索結果、回答、経路選択、ポリシー関連判断に付与される信頼度または不確実性の証拠です。」です。relation ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal だけで DiagnosticSignal にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ConfidenceSignal 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 DiagnosticSignal。
expected_result.en: ConfidenceSignal retains its own type; validation must not promote it to DiagnosticSignal from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ConfidenceSignal は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで DiagnosticSignal へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、ConfidenceSignal-is_a-DiagnosticSignal の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

short_definitions.zh: 错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文。
short_definitions.en: As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context.
short_definitions.ja: 失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです。

definitions.zh: 错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文。
definitions.en: As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context.
definitions.ja: 失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです。

why_needed.zh: 错误事件为canonical 事实 ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode（ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode）提供明确端点并保持与 WarningEvent 的定义边界；节点字段 error_code、error_event_id、severity 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: error event provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode (ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode) while preserving its reviewed boundary from WarningEvent; node fields error_code, error_event_id, severity make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: エラーイベントはcanonical 事実 ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode（ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode）の明確な端点を提供し、WarningEvent との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 error_code、error_event_id、severity によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的错误事件：错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文。；该种差可由字段 error_code、error_event_id、severity 检验。
includes.en: Includes error event records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context. The differentia can be checked through fields error_code, error_event_id, severity.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすエラーイベントを含みます：失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです。 種差は項目 error_code、error_event_id、severity で検査できます。

labels.ja: エラーイベントの正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将错误事件（ErrorEvent）记录为 ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode 的源端点。其已审查定义是“错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文”。记录同时写入经审查字段 error_code="TOOL_TIMEOUT", error_event_id="error-event-001", severity="error", retryable=true, occurred_at="2026-07-13T05:00:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records error event (ErrorEvent) as the source of ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode. Its reviewed definition is “As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context”. The record also binds reviewed fields error_code="TOOL_TIMEOUT", error_event_id="error-event-001", severity="error", retryable=true, occurred_at="2026-07-13T05:00:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムはエラーイベント（ErrorEvent）を ErrorEvent classified_by FailureMode の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです」です。記録には審査済み項目 error_code="TOOL_TIMEOUT", error_event_id="error-event-001", severity="error", retryable=true, occurred_at="2026-07-13T05:00:00.000Z" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 ErrorEvent 以及方向保持不变的事实 ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode。
expected_result.en: The run can query ErrorEvent together with direction-preserving fact ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode.
expected_result.ja: この実行では ErrorEvent と方向を保持した事実 ErrorEvent-classified_by-FailureMode を共に照会できます。

descriptions.zh: WarningEvent 用作ErrorEvent的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 WarningEvent 的已审查定义是“警告事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是从运行、工具、策略、检索、审查或遥测证据中提出警告的可观察事件，执行可以在约束下继续。”。不能因 shared parent FailureEvent 而把它归入ErrorEvent。
descriptions.en: WarningEvent is the boundary contrast for ErrorEvent. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but WarningEvent's reviewed definition is “As a Failure Event, Warning event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event that raises a warning from runtime, tool, policy, retrieval, review, or telemetry evidence while execution may continue under constraints.”. shared parent FailureEvent does not make it a ErrorEvent.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ErrorEvent（错误事件）由 feedback-warning-error 拥有，用于“当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ErrorEvent (error event) is owned by feedback-warning-error for the use case “Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ErrorEvent（エラーイベント）を feedback-warning-error が「事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ErrorEvent 的 semantic kind 为 event，主父或骨架为 ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent，并满足“semantic kind=event；backbone=ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms ErrorEvent has semantic kind event, primary parent or backbone ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent, and invariants “semantic kind=event; backbone=ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は ErrorEvent の semantic kind が event、主親または骨格が ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent であり、「semantic kind=event、backbone=ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ErrorEvent 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ErrorEvent were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ErrorEvent の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 错误事件已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: error event was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: エラーイベントは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 端点特定对照：父节点 FailureEvent：ErrorEvent（semantic kind=event，骨架 ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent）；WarningEvent（semantic kind=event，骨架 WarningEvent-is_a-FailureEvent）。双端条件：ErrorEvent 条件：“错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文”；WarningEvent 条件：“警告事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是从运行、工具、策略、检索、审查或遥测证据中提出警告的可观察事件，执行可以在约束下继续”。条件不得互借；各自成立后方可归类。
differentia.en: Endpoint-specific contrast: parent FailureEvent: ErrorEvent (semantic kind=event, backbone ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent); WarningEvent (semantic kind=event, backbone WarningEvent-is_a-FailureEvent). Endpoint conditions: ErrorEvent condition: “As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context”; WarningEvent condition: “As a Failure Event, Warning event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event that raises a warning from runtime, tool, policy, retrieval, review, or telemetry evidence while execution may continue under constraints”. Conditions cannot be borrowed; classify each endpoint only from its own evidence.
differentia.ja: 端点別対照：親 FailureEvent：ErrorEvent（semantic kind=event、バックボーン ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent）；WarningEvent（semantic kind=event、バックボーン WarningEvent-is_a-FailureEvent）。両端条件：ErrorEvent の条件：「失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです」；WarningEvent の条件：「失敗関連事象に属する警告イベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、実行、ツール、ポリシー、検索、レビュー、テレメトリ証拠から警告を発する観測可能イベントであり、実行は制約下で継続できます」。条件を流用せず、各端を固有の証拠で分類します。

short_definitions.zh: 错误流属于集合，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是在运行或协议执行期间观察到的错误事件、阻断性失败、可重试失败、警告升级和诊断消息的有序流。
short_definitions.en: Error stream is a collection whose defining condition is that it is an ordered stream of error events, blocking failures, retryable failures, warning escalations, and diagnostic messages observed during runtime or protocol execution.
short_definitions.ja: エラーストリームは集合のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、実行またはプロトコル処理中に観測されたエラーイベント、阻止的失敗、再試行可能な失敗、警告のエスカレーション、診断メッセージの順序付きストリームです。

definitions.zh: 错误流属于集合，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是在运行或协议执行期间观察到的错误事件、阻断性失败、可重试失败、警告升级和诊断消息的有序流。
definitions.en: Error stream is a collection whose defining condition is that it is an ordered stream of error events, blocking failures, retryable failures, warning escalations, and diagnostic messages observed during runtime or protocol execution.

why_needed.zh: 错误流为canonical 事实 ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent（ErrorStream contains ErrorEvent）提供明确端点并保持与 ErrorEvent 的定义边界。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的错误流：错误流属于集合，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是在运行或协议执行期间观察到的错误事件、阻断性失败、可重试失败、警告升级和诊断消息的有序流。；该种差可由关系 ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent 的端点角色检验。

excludes.zh: 错误事件只是关系 ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent 的另一端；相关联不表示它是错误流。

descriptions.zh: 在一次评估、纠正与改进决策循环中，系统将错误流（ErrorStream）记录为 ErrorStream contains ErrorEvent 的源端点。其已审查定义是“错误流属于集合，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是在运行或协议执行期间观察到的错误事件、阻断性失败、可重试失败、警告升级和诊断消息的有序流”。
descriptions.en: During an evaluation and correction cycle for improvement decisions, the system records error stream (ErrorStream) as the source of ErrorStream contains ErrorEvent. Its reviewed definition is “Error stream is a collection whose defining condition is that it is an ordered stream of error events, blocking failures, retryable failures, warning escalations, and diagnostic messages observed during runtime or protocol execution”.
descriptions.ja: 評価・修正・改善判断のサイクルでは、システムはエラーストリーム（ErrorStream）を ErrorStream contains ErrorEvent の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「エラーストリームは集合のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、実行またはプロトコル処理中に観測されたエラーイベント、阻止的失敗、再試行可能な失敗、警告のエスカレーション、診断メッセージの順序付きストリームです」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 ErrorStream 以及方向保持不变的事实 ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent。
expected_result.en: The run can query ErrorStream together with direction-preserving fact ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent.
expected_result.ja: この実行では ErrorStream と方向を保持した事実 ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。

descriptions.en: ErrorEvent is the boundary contrast for ErrorStream. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ErrorEvent's reviewed definition is “As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context.”. relation ErrorStream-contains-ErrorEvent does not make it a ErrorStream.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 ErrorStream（错误流）由 feedback-warning-error 拥有，用于“当事实表达对异常的诊断解释、可重复故障机制或已验证处置结果，而非仅记录运行中发生了什么时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms ErrorStream (error stream) is owned by feedback-warning-error for the use case “Own a fact when it expresses a diagnostic interpretation, a repeatable failure mechanism, or a verified resolution rather than merely recording what happened at runtime.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は ErrorStream（エラーストリーム）を feedback-warning-error が「事実が単なる実行記録ではなく、異常の診断解釈、再現可能な障害機構、検証済み解決を表す場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 ErrorStream 的 semantic kind 为 collection，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=collection；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms ErrorStream has semantic kind collection, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=collection; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は ErrorStream の semantic kind が collection、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=collection、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: ErrorStream 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for ErrorStream were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ErrorStream の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 错误流已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: error stream was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: エラーストリームは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 失败相关事件属于事件，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：FailureEvent 是在明确运行、调用、协议或策略位置发生的异常、失败或警告事件，具有时间、位置和影响；失败模式分类它，诊断信号解释它。
short_definitions.en: Failure Event is an event whose defining condition is that it is an abnormal, failed, or warning occurrence at an explicit run, call, protocol, or policy location, with time, location, and impact; a failure mode classifies it and diagnostic signals explain it.

descriptions.zh: ErrorEvent 用作FailureEvent的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ErrorEvent 的已审查定义是“错误事件是一种失败相关事件；其区分条件是：它是可观察事件，记录失败、异常、超时、验证错误、被阻断操作或不可恢复运行状态，并携带轨迹与诊断上下文。”。不能因 relation ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent 而把它归入FailureEvent。
descriptions.en: ErrorEvent is the boundary contrast for FailureEvent. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ErrorEvent's reviewed definition is “As a Failure Event, Error event is distinguished by the fact that it is an observable event recording a failure, exception, timeout, validation error, blocked operation, or unrecoverable runtime condition with trace and diagnostic context.”. relation ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent does not make it a FailureEvent.
descriptions.ja: ErrorEvent は FailureEvent の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ErrorEvent の審査済み定義は「失敗関連事象に属するエラーイベントは、次の事実を種差とします：それは、失敗、例外、タイムアウト、検証エラー、阻止された操作、復旧不能な実行状態を、トレースと診断文脈とともに記録する観測可能イベントです。」です。relation ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent だけで FailureEvent にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ErrorEvent 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 FailureEvent。
expected_result.en: ErrorEvent retains its own type; validation must not promote it to FailureEvent from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ErrorEvent は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで FailureEvent へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、ErrorEvent-is_a-FailureEvent の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。
